subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Render thou thanks unto the Lord that thou hast been made to drink from the wine of the All-Merciful's grace and hast been refreshed by the chalice of His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله حمد کن خدا را که از خمر رحمت رحمانی مشروب گشتی و از کاس فضل مرزوق
